summaryLegal: Counter to Initech's redlined MSA: hold Section 7.1 aggregate liability cap at CAD $5,000,000 with a Section 9 (Data Protection) sub-cap of CAD $3,000,000; accept Section 2 SLA tier and Section 9.3 audit cadence as drafted; concede Section 4.2 to Net 60 payment with 0.75% / month interest; reject Section 5.2 convenience termination beyond a 60-day wind-down; agree to Section 6.1 custom-IP transfer language as drafted.
summaryPlain: We give them the SLA tier, audit access, Net 60 payment, and let them own custom builds they pay for. We hold a hard line on liability — uncapped data exposure would end the company in a single incident. We give them a 60-day exit on convenience termination so they're not locked in. Net retained value vs accepting their full markup: ~CAD $280,000.
complianceFlags: OSFI third-party risk themes triggered (insurance minimums, breach window, audit, step-in)
